e.v: You may sell financed items at any time. Remaining balance must be paid from sale proceeds.
Choose your search scope. Higher tiers cost more and take longer, but have better success rates and match quality.
Search nearby dealers. Guaranteed 1 month response, 2% cost, 40% success rate.
Search regional network. 1-3 months, 6% cost, 70% success rate.
Search nationwide. 2-6 months, 12% cost, 85% success rate.
Lower quality = cheaper price but more repairs needed
No active finance or lease deals.
Finance vehicles from the shop (F key). Search for used equipment (V key). Payments are automatically deducted monthly.
Land financing typically offers lower interest rates.
Land ownership transfers immediately. You can use the field right away.
Warning: Failure to make monthly payments may result in land seizure.
Search for %s failed. No matches found.
Your agent was unable to find a %s matching your criteria. The search fee is non-refundable. You may start a new search if desired.
%s has been paid off in full!
MISSED LEASE PAYMENT: Unable to pay %s for %s
%s sold. Finance balance of %s paid from proceeds.
Failed to start search. Please try again.
Insufficient funds for lease termination. Required: %s
Cannot sell leased vehicle. End lease first or wait until lease expires.
Cannot sell. Remaining balance (%s) exceeds sale price (%s).
Maximum %d vehicles can be listed for sale at once. Wait for a sale to complete or cancel a listing.
Bargain bin - may be inoperable or need extensive repairs
Cheapest working - may need significant repairs
Credit score affects your interest rate. Improve it by maintaining a low debt-to-asset ratio.
Higher down payment reduces monthly payments and may lower interest rate.
Cash back is deducted from down payment. Increases amount financed.
You can pay off your loan early to save on interest. Prepayment penalties may apply.
Keep leased vehicles in good condition to avoid return penalties.
Spread payments over 1-20 years. Longer terms = smaller monthly payments but more total interest paid.
Pay upfront to reduce loan amount. Higher down payment = lower interest rate and monthly payment. Range: 0-50%.
Receive cash immediately (added to your loan). Useful for operating expenses, but increases monthly payments and total cost.
Deducted from your farm account automatically every in-game month. Ensure you have enough money!
Extra cost of financing vs. paying cash. This is what you pay for spreading payments over time.
Purchase price + total interest = what you'll actually pay over the entire loan term.
Annual percentage charged on your loan. Based on credit score and down payment. Lower is better!
Your farm's financial rating (300-850). Higher score = lower rates. Improve by keeping debt low and paying on time.
Lease for 1-5 years, then return vehicle or pay residual value to keep it. Shorter terms = higher monthly payments.
Upfront payment. Lower maximum (20%) than financing because you don't own the vehicle yet.
Amount to pay at lease end if you want to keep the vehicle. Based on estimated depreciation. Return vehicle instead to pay nothing extra (if in good condition).
Deducted automatically each month during lease term. Lower than finance payments because you don't pay full vehicle value.
Down payment + all monthly payments. Does NOT include residual value if you choose to buy at end.
Annual percentage for lease. Higher than finance rates (5.5% vs 4.5%) because of higher lender risk.
At lease end: damage >10% or wear >15% = penalties up to 30% of vehicle price. Keep vehicle maintained!
Search nearby dealers. Guaranteed 1 month response, 2% cost, 40% success. Fast and cheap.
Search regional network. 1-3 months, 6% cost, 70% success. Good balance for most searches.
Search nationwide. 2-6 months, 12% cost, 85% success. Best for rare equipment.
Upfront fee deducted immediately. Non-refundable even if search fails.
In-game months until results. You'll get a notification when search completes.
Probability of finding this type of equipment in used condition at all.
Total amount you still owe across all loans and leases. Keep below your asset value!
Total deducted from your account each month. Ensure you always have enough cash flow!
300-850 rating. 750+ = Excellent, 650-749 = Good, 550-649 = Fair, <550 = Poor. Affects all future interest rates!
Combined value of vehicles, equipment, fields, and buildings you own. Should be higher than your debt!
Total Debt ÷ Asset Value. Keep below 30% for excellent credit. Above 50% hurts your score significantly!
Portion of original loan you've paid back. This reduces your balance.
Extra cost you've paid so far for borrowing money. This does NOT reduce your balance.
Total interest you'll pay if you continue minimum monthly payments. Pay extra now to reduce this!
One-time fee for paying off early (usually 1-3% of balance). Charged because lender loses future interest income.
Amount you still owe (principal only). Paying extra reduces this faster!
Shows how your payment divides: Principal (pays down balance) vs Interest (borrowing cost).
Your credit score determines your maximum borrowing limit and interest rate.
Collateral is calculated from 50% of vehicle values and 60% of land values.
Loan approved! %s deposited to your account.
Loan denied. Insufficient collateral or poor credit.
This vehicle does not need repairs.
Based on assets vs debt ratio
Select a vehicle to trade in:
Trade-in value is 85% of sell price. Same-brand purchases get a 10% bonus.
Financed vehicles cannot be traded in
Tip: Make payments on time to improve your credit score. Pay off loans early to save on interest.
50-65% instant value when purchasing a new vehicle
Quick local sale. 1-2 months, 85% success rate.
This vehicle is already listed for sale
Cannot sell financed vehicles. Pay off balance first.
A buyer has been found for your vehicle!
Offer expired for %s. Agent continues searching...
No buyer was found during the listing period.
You can relist this vehicle with the same or different agent/price settings.
No buyer found for %s. Agent fee (%s) was non-refundable.
Cancel sale listing for %s? Agent fee will NOT be refunded.
Engine struggling - max speed reduced to %d%%!
ENGINE OVERHEATED! Let it cool down!
Implement lowered due to hydraulic failure
Engine shows signs of hard use. Expect occasional stalling under load.
Hydraulic system worn. Implements may drift when raised.
Electrical issues detected. Implements may cut out unexpectedly.
Negotiate price or budget for repairs
Good mechanical condition - proceed with confidence
No sale listing in this row
No finance deal in this row
Cannot cancel - this listing is ready for purchase
This search is no longer active
No pending offer on this listing
Cannot cancel while offer is pending. Accept or decline first.
Cannot modify price while an offer is pending.
Invalid price. Please enter a positive number.
Invalid amount. Please enter a positive number.
Insufficient funds. Need %s for monthly payment.
Insufficient funds for down payment! Need %s
No active finance deals to make payments on
No active finance deals to pay
Your credit score (%d) is below the minimum (%d) required for %s.
Tip: Make on-time payments on existing loans to build credit.
Credit score too low for financing. Your score: %d (need %d+). Build credit with on-time payments.
Credit score too low for leasing. Your score: %d (need %d+). Leasing requires better credit than financing.
Credit score too low (%d). Need %d+ to finance land.
Credit score too low (%d). Need %d+ to finance repairs.
Building financing requires Excellent credit (%d+). Your credit: %d (%s)
Buildings cannot be leased. Use Cash or Finance options.
Amount too small for financing. Minimum: %s
Amount too small for leasing. Minimum: %s
Repair cost too small to finance. Minimum: %s
Land price too small for financing. Minimum: %s
Action not authorized for your farm
This feature is disabled in settings
You already have a lease on this land
Offer declined - agent will continue searching
Purchased %s - Visit shop to collect vehicle
Financed %s - Visit shop to collect vehicle
Building Financed! %s Down: %s | Monthly: %s for %d years
Land lease for %s has been terminated
Start making payments to build your history
Pay off early to save on interest.
Good condition - fair deal at this price
Fair condition - negotiate or budget for repairs
%s inspection complete for %s! View report now.

Request %s inspection for %s?
Ready in ~%d hours.
Full details + DNA hint + repair estimate
This vehicle is in excellent condition with no maintenance concerns.
Select a loan above to change its payment mode
WARNING: Skipping payments will increase balance!
Early payoff saves you %s in interest!
Inspections not available for non-powered implements. Buy as-is only.
Insufficient funds! Need %s more. Try financing or leasing.
Insufficient funds for security deposit! Need %s more.
Use Financial Dashboard (ESC Menu) to take credit-based loans
Vanilla borrowing disabled. Open Financial Dashboard for credit-based loans.
Prices reflect seller's asking price. Negotiate based on inspection findings.
Tip: Make payments on time to improve credit. Pay off loans early to save on interest.
The following items were repossessed due to missed payments:
Click to toggle assets as collateral (only unencumbered assets shown)
Loan funds deposited immediately. Payments auto-deducted monthly.
Payments auto-deducted monthly. On-time payments improve credit!
This repossession severely impacts your credit score. Future financing will be more expensive or denied.
Make timely payments to avoid future repossessions.
Choose how you want to pay: cash upfront, finance over time, or lease with lower payments.
Select a vehicle to trade in and reduce your amount due.
Pay the full amount now. Trade-in value is deducted from the total.
Spread payments over time. Adjust term, down payment, and cash back to find your ideal monthly payment.
Longer terms = lower monthly AND lower buyout. Down payment reduces amount due today.
Choose how you want to pay: cash upfront, finance over time, or lease the land.
Pay the full amount now to own the land outright.
Finance the land purchase with monthly payments. Adjust term and down payment below.
Lease the land with monthly payments. Rate is based on acreage and soil quality.
Higher tiers cost more but have better success rates and find higher quality matches.
Vehicle has been inspected - view report
Percentage of remaining damage to fix. 100% = restore to full condition.
Percentage of paint wear to restore. 100% = fresh factory finish.
Pay now or finance over time with monthly payments.
Hire an agent to find buyers. Higher-tier agents reach more buyers but charge more.
Agent searches for buyers. You receive offers to accept or decline.
Agent fee is non-refundable. Vehicle remains yours until sold.
Your agent is now searching for buyers.
You'll receive offers to accept or decline as buyers are found.
May get better offer, or listing expires
Select a loan above to change its payment mode
Return to dealer, pay any damage penalties
Pay residual value, keep vehicle permanently
You must choose an option. Returning gives you your deposit back. Buyout uses your equity toward purchase. Renewing extends the lease with equity applied to future buyout.
This choice will appear again next month. No additional charges until you decide.
Pay on time to build credit
Enable credit scoring in UsedPlus settings to view your credit report.
Regional searches offer the best value for success rate.
Higher agent tiers have wider reach but longer wait times.
Used vehicle search disabled in settings
Vehicle sale system disabled in settings
Start searches from shop via 'Search Used'
No active searches. Start from Shop.
No listings. Sell from Garage menu.
UsedPlus expands the vanilla economy with realistic financing, a used marketplace, and credit system.
Finance or lease from Shop. Trade-In old equipment. Sell via agents for better returns than vanilla.
Shop → 'Search Used' to hire agents. LOCAL: 2%, 40%. REGIONAL: 6%, 70%. NATIONAL: 12%, 85%.
Higher tiers = wider search, better odds. Used vehicles have varying condition and hours.
Garage → List for Sale. Trade-In: 50-65%. Local: 60-75%. Regional: 75-90%. National: 90-100%.
Condition and hours affect value. Accept/decline offers from this screen.
Determines interest rates and trade-in values. Improves through: on-time payments, completing deals. Drops from: missed payments, defaults.
Assets provide collateral but don't prove creditworthiness. Payment history matters most—inherited land doesn't mean good credit!
Shop → Finance/Lease/Search Used | Garage → List for Sale
Monthly payments auto-deduct. Early payoff saves interest.
You must be in a vehicle to use the UsedPlus Admin Panel. Enter a vehicle first, then press ESC.
Lease allows land use without full purchase.
Land returns to market at lease end unless bought out.
Land financing has lower rates than vehicle loans.
Monthly payments auto-deduct. Pay off early to save on interest.
I'm genuinely surprised this made it to the lot.
Whoever assembled this should find a new career.
I'd tell ya to run, but I reckon this thing couldn't catch ya anyway.
I'd burn some sage before driving this one off the lot.
This thing's got more bad juju than a broken mirror factory.
My cousin had one like this. Used it for a chicken coop after. That's about all it was good for.
Some machines just come off the line wrong. This is one of them.
My advice? Budget for a lot of shop visits.
If machines could be cursed, this one surely is.
Something ain't right with this one. Can't explain it, but I feel it in my bones.
She'll run, but don't expect her to thank you for it.
This here's what we call a 'parts tractor' back home.
Might want to keep your mechanic on speed dial.
My grandfather would've called this one 'snake-bit.'
Some tractors attract trouble like a lightning rod. This is one of 'em.
She's about as reliable as a screen door on a submarine.
She'll get the job done. Eventually.
Not saying it's haunted, but I wouldn't leave it running alone at night.
Some machines carry a little bad karma. This one's got a touch.
I've seen better put together by my nephew with a wrench and some baling wire.
Standard factory quality. That's all I can say.
My gut says she'll give you a few headaches. Gut's usually right.
There's an old saying - some iron just don't want to cooperate.
Right down the middle. Nothing remarkable, nothing concerning.
She'll give you fair service for fair treatment.
It ain't fancy, but it'll plow a field same as any other.
The spirits are neutral on this one, if you believe in that sort of thing.
Not blessed, not cursed. Just... a machine.
Whoever put this together knew what they were doing.
That's a machine that'll be with you through more than a few harvests.
Got a good feeling about this one. Call it mechanic's intuition.
Some machines just want to work. This one's got that spirit in her.
This one came out of the factory right.
Now that's the kind of iron my grandpappy would've been proud to park in the barn.
Someone on the assembly line was having a good day.
My old mentor used to say some tractors are born lucky. This might be one.
There's good iron and bad iron. This here's the good stuff.
Now THIS is how they should all be built.
She's a keeper if I ever saw one.
Finer than frog hair split four ways - and that's sayin' somethin'.
If I believed in lucky stars, I'd say this one was born under a whole constellation.
Some machines got a soul. This one's got a good one.
In 30 years, I've seen maybe a dozen this well built.
This one here's got more soul than a Sunday gospel choir.
Hold onto this one. You won't find another like it.
Old-timers used to talk about tractors like this. Thought they were just legends.
This one's got guardian angels working overtime in the engine bay.
Warning: Tires are getting worn. Consider replacement soon.
CRITICAL: Tires are critically worn! Replace immediately to avoid flat tire.
FLAT TIRE! Vehicle handling severely impaired. Tire replacement required.
Warning: Low traction due to worn tires. Reduce speed in poor conditions.
Warning: Oil level is low. Service required soon.
CRITICAL: Oil level dangerously low! Engine damage occurring.
Warning: Oil leak detected. Fluid loss accelerating.
ENGINE DAMAGE: Permanent reliability loss due to running low on oil!
Warning: Hydraulic fluid is low. Service required soon.
CRITICAL: Hydraulic fluid dangerously low! System damage occurring.
Warning: Hydraulic leak detected. Fluid loss accelerating.
HYDRAULIC DAMAGE: Permanent reliability loss due to running low on fluid!
Some loans require EnhancedLoanSystem mod to manage. Data preserved but inaccessible.
Warning: Fuel leak detected! Fuel consumption significantly increased.
ENGINE RUNAWAY! Governor failure - TURN OFF ENGINE!
HYDRAULIC LIFT FAILURE - Implement cannot raise!
HYDRAULIC VALVE FAILURE - Implement cannot lower!
Budget option - lower traction, higher failure risk
Premium tires - better traction, lower failure risk
Click a tire type to select. Higher quality = better performance.
New tires restore 100% condition. Retreads are recycled casings.
Please select a tire quality first.
Click services to select. Refills restore fluid levels to 100%.
Please select at least one service.
Drive a vehicle nearby to refill engine oil and hydraulic fluid.
Large capacity oil service point for refilling engine oil and hydraulic fluid.
Not enough hydraulic fluid in storage
Significant oil leak detected - needs immediate attention.
Minor oil leak present - may worsen over time.
Oil level critically low - top up before operation.
Oil level below recommended - needs topping up.
Oil level adequate but monitor regularly.
Major hydraulic leak found - repair urgently needed.
Small hydraulic leak detected - keep an eye on it.
Hydraulic fluid dangerously low - implements may not function properly.
Hydraulic fluid running low - recommend refill.
CAUTION: Fuel leak detected - fire hazard, needs repair.
Portable OBD diagnostic scanner for emergency field repairs. Connects to vehicle diagnostics port to read fault codes and sensor data. Consumable - single use.
OBD scan detected faults in multiple systems. Which system do you want to diagnose?
Choose the system most likely at fault - misdiagnosis reduces repair effectiveness
Based on these diagnostic codes, what is the root cause?
Cylinder misfire detected - irregular combustion pattern
Exhaust sensor: Rich fuel mixture / incomplete combustion
Power output: 40% below rated - declining trend
Starter motor cycles: Excessive cranking required
RPM fluctuation: Engine stalling under load
Idle quality: Unstable RPM at rest
High RPM misfire: Ignition timing fault
Timing analysis: Combustion occurring in exhaust
Engine status: No ignition - cranks but won't fire
Starter circuit: No current to starter motor
Relay status: Rapid clicking - insufficient power
Run time: Engine dies shortly after start
Voltage level: Below normal - lights dim at idle
Battery status: Not charging while running
Response time: Hydraulic actuators slow to move
Lift capacity: Below rated lifting force
Pump noise: High-pitched whine under load
Leak detector: External fluid loss detected
Fluid level: Dropping - external leak likely
Pressure trend: Gradual decline over time
Cleared blocked air filter - airflow restored.
Cleaned fuel filter - fuel flow restored.
Cleaned terminals and jump-started - power restored.
Topped up hydraulic fluid from kit reserves.
Excellent work! Full repair bonus applied.
Right system, but incorrect cause identified.
Good diagnosis! But the actual problem was in: %s
Wrong system and incorrect cause. Minimal repair applied.
Wrong system identified. Only basic maintenance applied.
Right system, but the specific cause was different.
The actual problem was in a different system.
This is an emergency fix. Visit a proper workshop for full service.
Further diagnostics on this system require workshop equipment
OBD Scanner consumed. All field-serviceable adjustments have been made to this system.
Repair in progress - cannot cancel at this stage.
No vehicle detected within range. Move the scanner closer to a vehicle.
FLAT TIRE DETECTED - Click to Repair
All tires OK - No repair needed
DTC P0xxx: Powertrain fault codes stored
Air-fuel mixture readings out of specification
DTC B/U codes: Network communication faults
Flow rate irregularities in aux circuits
No RVB data available for this vehicle
This system has already received field service. Further repairs require workshop equipment.
Mobile workshop for long-term vehicle restoration. Can restore reliability AND reliability ceiling over time. Requires diesel, oil, hydraulic fluid, and spare parts.
Warning: Restoration damage due to empty resources!
Select a component to begin deep restoration. Unlike field repairs, this process takes hours but can fully restore the vehicle.
Incorrect diagnosis. You must wait before retrying this component.
Restoration paused - need more spare parts!
Your National Agent Has a Connection
"I know a mechanic retiring from the repair business. He's got a fully-equipped service truck he's looking to sell. Cash only, but I can get you a good deal. Interested?"
The only way to save lemons
Service Truck purchased! Find it at the shop spawn point.
Opportunity saved. Check Finance Manager to purchase later.
You already own a Service Truck.
Service Truck has no oil! Fill the oil tank before diagnosing.
Consumable spare parts for Service Truck restoration. Place near the truck during restoration work.
Stored fault codes across all modules
Internal leak detected - pressure won't hold
Wear metals in oil: Critical levels
Pressure test: Flow but no pressure
Main bearing replacement and crankshaft inspection
Piston ring replacement and cylinder honing
Only the server admin can change settings.
Apply a preset configuration (changes all settings below)
Enable financing for vehicle and land purchases
Enable vehicle and land leasing with buyout options
Enable agent-based searching for used equipment
Enable agent-based vehicle sales (replaces instant sell)
Enable partial repair and repaint options
Enable trading in vehicles during purchases
Enable realistic tire degradation over time
Enable random breakdowns and component failures
How often malfunctions occur. 100% = normal, 50% = half as often, 200% = twice as often
How fast oil and hydraulic fluid deplete. 100% = normal, 50% = half speed, 200% = double. Does not affect leak drain rates.
Enable partial repairs in vehicle shop (disabling hides repair button)
Enable partial repaints in vehicle shop (disabling hides repaint button)
Scale land prices with game difficulty (like vehicles). Easy: 60%, Normal: 100%, Hard: 140%
Earn interest on positive cash balances (monthly, like a savings account)
Annual interest rate on cash. 1% = $10,000 annual on $1M balance
Enable Real Vehicle Breakdowns integration. Disable if experiencing issues with RVB.
Enable Use Your Tyres integration. Disable if experiencing issues with UYT.
Enable AdvancedMaintenance integration. Chains engine damage checks between mods.
Enable HirePurchasing integration. Hides UsedPlus Finance button (HP handles financing).
Enable BuyUsedEquipment integration. Hides UsedPlus Search button (BUE handles used search).
Enable EnhancedLoanSystem integration. Disables UsedPlus loans (ELS handles them).
Enable Better Contracts integration. Applies earned farmland discounts from completed contracts.
Base rate for all financing (vehicles, land, loans). Credit score modifies this.
Base percentage of sell price for trade-ins (±7.5% variance)
Multiplier applied to all repair costs
Multiplier applied to repaint costs (separate from repair)
Lease rate markup (÷10 for percentage points, e.g., 15 = +1.5pp)
Number of missed payments before vehicle repossession
Minimum required down payment for financing
Initial credit score for new games
Credit score points lost per late payment
Base chance to find used vehicles. Tiers add bonuses: Economy +0%, Standard +10%, Premium +20%, Elite +30%
Maximum active sale listings per farm (internal setting)
How much condition affects vehicle price
Extra trade-in value when buying same brand
When ON, Buy/Lease buttons open UsedPlus dialog. When OFF, use Finance button instead. Disable if you have conflicts with other shop mods.
When ON, RVB's Repair button opens UsedPlus partial repair. When OFF, use Map > Repair Vehicle for UsedPlus features. Only applies with Real Vehicle Breakdowns installed.
Maximum forgiveness - focus on farming, not finance
Default balanced simulation - the intended experience
Just finance and lease - no extras
Full simulation - best with RVB/UYT mods
Default balanced simulation - the intended experience
Maximum forgiveness - focus on farming, not finance
Just finance and lease - no extras
Between you and me... they seem pretty eager to sell. Might be in a tough spot.
Between you and me... I've seen this rig listed for a while now. Seller might be motivated.
Between you and me... heard they're upgrading to bigger equipment. Could be flexible.
Between you and me... they've priced it fair and know exactly what it's worth.
Between you and me... just hit the market. Might not be in a rush to deal.
Between you and me... seems like a straightforward seller. Worth making an offer.
Plus, with that storm rolling in, they might want to close quick.
Rain's keeping everyone cooped up... good time to push for a deal.
That hail's got folks worried about their gear sitting out.
Snow falling... off-season always makes sellers more flexible.
Beautiful day like this though... don't expect any favors.
I can't go that low, but I'll meet you partway. How about %s?
Sorry, but I can't accept that. My price is firm at %s.
I think we're too far apart. Come back if you change your mind.
Alright, alright... you drive a hard bargain. I'll take it.
Look, %s is as low as I can go. Take it or leave it.
I don't think we're going to agree. Maybe another time.
Seller is unavailable. Try again in %d minutes.
They might cool off after a bit...
You cannot afford this offer. Used vehicle purchases are cash only.
You need %s more to complete this purchase.
Your offer insulted the seller. They've refused to do business with you and this vehicle is no longer available.
This seller knows exactly what they have - a machine that's been nothing but reliable. They won't entertain lowball offers.
This seller knows exactly what they have. Don't expect any negotiation room.
Vehicle financing is disabled in UsedPlus settings.
Vehicle leasing is disabled in UsedPlus settings.
Land financing is disabled in UsedPlus settings.
Land leasing is disabled in UsedPlus settings.
ENGINE SEIZED! Repair required before vehicle will start.
HYDRAULICS SEIZED! Implements are locked in place.
ELECTRICAL FAILURE! All systems are dead.

%s is seized and requires emergency repair.
Repair cost: %s
Proceed with repair?
LAND SEIZED: %s has been taken due to non-payment!
Payment amount is below the minimum required.
Payment amount exceeds the remaining balance.
Not enough money to pay the lease termination fee.
Financing requires a credit score of %d or higher.
Leasing requires a credit score of %d or higher.
Purchase failed - game API not available.
Down payment cannot exceed the purchase price.
Down payment cannot exceed the lease price.
Monthly Finance: %d paid, %d MISSED! Check Finance Manager.
Lease term complete for %s! Choose to return, buyout, or renew.
Payment skipped for %s. Interest of %s added to balance.
Missed land payment for %s! Interest of %s added. (1st warning)
FINAL WARNING: Missed land payment for %s! One more = SEIZURE!
Missed payment for %s. Interest of %s added to balance. (1st warning)
FINAL WARNING: Missed payment for %s. One more missed payment will result in repossession!
VEHICLE REPOSSESSED: %s has been taken due to non-payment!
Missed loan payment! Interest of %s added. (1st warning)
FINAL WARNING: Missed loan payment! One more missed payment will result in loan default!
LOAN DEFAULTED! No collateral could be recovered.
FINAL WARNING: Missed lease payment for %s! One more = REPOSSESSION!
LEASE VEHICLE REPOSSESSED: %s has been taken due to non-payment!
Lease ended for %s! Choose to return or buyout.
Land lease for %s expires in 3 months! Buyout price: %s
WARNING: Land lease for %s expires next month! Buy out now or lose access!
FINAL WARNING: Land lease for %s expires this month!
Missed land lease payment for %s. Please ensure funds are available.
FINAL WARNING: 2nd missed payment for %s. One more and you WILL lose the land!
Land lease TERMINATED due to non-payment! %s has been reclaimed.
Land lease for %s has expired. The land is now available for purchase.
Land lease for %s terminated. Land returned to market.
Credit Improved! Your credit is now %s (%d)
Credit Warning: Your credit dropped to %s (%d)
%d vehicle offer(s) expired - sellers found other buyers
Offer expired for %s. Agent continues searching...
No buyer found for %s. Agent fee ($%d) was non-refundable.
Vehicle no longer available to relist.
Declined %s offer for %s. Agent continues searching...
Declined offer for %s. Listing has expired.
Cancelled sale listing for %s. Agent fee ($%d) was non-refundable.
Search complete! Your %s has been delivered.
The seller of the %s accepted another offer and is no longer available. Keep searching!
Lease signed! %s - Visit shop to collect vehicle
Insufficient funds for damage penalty. Need %s
Land lease terminated: %s has been returned
Land purchased! %s is now yours. Equity applied: %s
Vehicle purchased! %s is now yours. Equity applied: %s
Lease renewed: %s. Equity of %s applied to future buyout!
This land is already owned and cannot be leased.
You already have a lease on this land.
Congratulations! %s is now fully yours for %s
Congratulations! Your bank loan has been paid off!
UsedPlus: Credited %d prior bank loan payments to your history!
UsedPlus v%s -- Development Preview Latest version & support: github.com/XelaNull/FS25_UsedPlus
HP lease payments are automatic - managed by HirePurchasing
No vehicles found yet. Check back next month!
Offer declined. Seller has been notified.
Leased vehicles cannot be sold. Terminate the lease first.
Financed vehicles cannot be sold until loan is paid off.
This vehicle is pledged as collateral for a %s loan. Pay off the loan first to sell.
This vehicle is already listed for sale.
Sale system error. Please try again.
You do not own this vehicle.
Purchase failed - game API not available
Building financing requires Excellent credit (%d+). Your credit: %d
This listing has already been completed.
Insufficient funds for ELS loan payment
Insufficient funds. Minimum payment: %s, You have: %s
No vanilla loan balance to pay
Please select a sales option and price tier.
Premium pricing requires better vehicle condition.
No vehicles in portfolio. Check back next month!
Tank contains %s! Empty it first to add %s.
Make payments to build credit history
No probed cells nearby -- use gauge colors as clues
Nearby gauges show RED -- likely Seized
Nearby gauges show AMBER -- likely Cracked
Nearby gauges show GREEN -- likely Corroded
Flag all faults before beginning repair!
Perfect diagnosis! Maximum repair quality achieved.
Select a component below 90% reliability to begin fault tracing.
1. PROBE cells to reveal gauge colors
2. Use gauge hints to find faults
3. FLAG cells you think are faulty
5. Begin Repair when all faults flagged
Use the Field Service Kit for emergency field repairs
RVB parts degrade with operating hours
Select a component below 90% to begin inspection.
Diesel, Oil, Hydraulic fluid will be consumed
Try a different component in the meantime.
The symptoms don't match this diagnosis.
View details to inspect. Decline to remove from portfolio.
Use Prev/Next to browse. View Details to inspect or buy.
View Details to inspect condition or purchase this vehicle.
Your agent will search monthly and notify you when vehicles are found.
Check Used Marketplace in ESC menu to view search progress.
The following %d item(s) were repossessed due to missed payments:
Regional agents cover a wider area but take longer.
Local searches are fast but find fewer options.
National searches find the best deals but take the longest.
Higher quality targets find better vehicles but cost more.
Your agent is actively searching the used market.
Higher agent tiers have wider reach and find buyers faster.
You have a pending offer! Review it before it expires.
Declining offers reduces remaining listing time.
Premium pricing requires patience but yields higher returns.
Quick sale pricing attracts buyers fast at a lower price.
No listings (0/%d). Sell from Garage menu.
No agent fee, but longer time and lower success rate.
Fire sale pricing. Easy to find buyers.
Quick local search with small buyer pool. 1 month, 30% monthly chance, up to 3 finds.
Balanced search with wider reach. Up to 3 months, 55% monthly chance, up to 6 finds.
Premium nationwide search. Up to 6 months, 85% monthly chance, up to 10 finds. Guaranteed at least 1.
Wildcard - high variance in quality and price
Like new - ready to work immediately
Between you and me... seems like a straightforward seller.
Plus, with this weather, they might want to close quick.
Beautiful day like this though... don't expect any favors.

This will check mechanical condition, reliability ratings, and provide a detailed report.
Inspection results are available immediately.
Finance vehicle repairs and repaints over time.
Lease vehicles with option to buy at end of term.
Borrow against your assets for immediate cash.

Focus on making consistent on-time payments to rebuild your score.
Try to reduce your debt-to-asset ratio below 30%% for the best rates.
Your debt-to-asset ratio is high. Pay down existing loans to improve your score.
Excellent credit! You qualify for the best rates and terms.
Paying on time is the single biggest factor in your credit score.
Keep your debt-to-asset ratio below 50%% for better rates.
Longer credit history helps — time and consistency are key.
A mix of vehicle loans, land financing, and leases shows responsible borrowing.
Missing a payment has a bigger impact than making extra payments.
Good progress! Keep making on-time payments to reach Excellent.
High debt load detected. Focus on paying down existing loans.
Missed payments are dragging down your score. Prioritize catching up.
A mix of account types (loans, leases, land) can improve your score.
No credit history yet. Take out a small loan to start building your score.
Make all payments on time for 6 months to see significant improvement.
Open a financing deal to start building your credit history.
Consider refinancing older loans to take advantage of your low rates.
Start with a small loan and pay it on time to build credit.
Build a longer on-time payment streak to boost your score.
Credit takes time to build. Keep making payments consistently.
